topic_text: When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Grab a Jacket Warning. If the temperature outside drops below 50 degrees F, change my dashboard color to blue to remind me to grab a jacket.

When Force Stop from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Mute using Musaic. Stop the music! Force stop on your Sphero band to mute your Musaic HiFi. The force gives you the power to mute the room  ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ command attention like you're Darth Vader!

When Device is unplugged from Android Battery, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Store Battery Info in Adafruit. Make sure you set your feed on Adafruit IO It also works out best if you setup the battery disconnect one as well.

When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Send today's high temp (F) to Adafruit IO feed. Push today's forecast high temperature to Adafruit IO for display on a FeatherWing OLED display, for example! https://learn.adafruit.com/digital-display-badge/
When Current pollen count rises above from Weather Underground, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Allergy Warning. If pollen levels get to high, change color on dashboard to red!

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Update Indicator using LaMetric Time. If battery is low ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ remind me to charge. Never forget to charge your phone in the eveningSee the notification right on your LaMetric.

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Send my car a notification using BMW Labs. If my Android phone battery drops below 15%, then send my BMW a notification. Too many times I forget to plug in my phone when driving and arrive with a flat battery, especially when streaming to the carTip, use a charge only socket and/or a charge only cable to prevent USB from killing BT streaming or use an app to force BT over USB audio when charging.

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Send blink event using blink(1). Blink your blink(1) when your Android battery is low. Get alerted to a low phone battery with blink(1)! When your battery is low, the specified rule will run.

When Force Push from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Change to random color using Philips Hue. Use 'Force Push' to change hue lights to random color. Use 'Force Push' to change the color of your hue lights, and fist bump your way to a disco party.
When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Send a notification to my Recon device using Recon. Phone Battery Alert In Recon. Be notified when your phone is going to die while exercising

When Device is plugged in from Android Battery, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Store Battery Info in Adafruit. Store battery into in io.Adafruit make sure you choose your feedWorks best if you are also running the disconnect as wellPut them both in the same feed and you can see how long you are charging and how long your battery lastsThe ups are charges and the downs are discharging.

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If android battery is low, then send data to Battery feed. This is useful to track when and how often you let your battery run low on your android phoneThe value sent to the feed is your battery percentage.
When New liked song from Musaic, do Speak to me using Musaic. What is this song called?. If I Like a song on my Musaic system, tell me its name and artist.
When Every day at from Date & Time, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Daily feed fish. Feed fish

When You exit an area from Location, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If you leave home, update adafruit io feed.. Select your home address, select your adafruit feed, you could write a ZERO to the feed (indicating AWAY), then use another Applet for arriving home.

When You enter an area from Location, do Play radio preset using Musaic. When I get home turn on the radio. This recipe starts playback of a radio preset on a Musaic player when your iOS device enters a known location.

When You enter or exit an area from Location, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If you enter an area, send the status to your tracking feed.. This will send "entered" or "exited" to your specified feed whenever you enter and exit your designated area.

When You enter an area from Location, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If your iOS device enters an area, notify feed. Send current location to feed if your iOS device is in a defined location.
When Monitor a sensor value from Seeed, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Seeed Sensor to Adafruit IO. Publish a Seeed Sensor to and Adafruit IO service

When Monitor a sensor value from Seeed, do Send a command using openHAB. WioLink to OpenHAB. This rule is triggered by the default timer within IFTTT and sends the value to openhab through My.openhab.orgMake sure to have the items in openhab defined and run to my.openhab.org through myopenhab.persist.Also make sure, that you already can see the items in my.openhab.orgThrough changing them or through a trigger in myopenhab.persist.
When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Blink lights using LIFX. Lifx lights blink when phone less than 15%. Lifx lights blink when phone less than 15%

When Any new data from Adafruit, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Feed Copier. Copy one feed to another.Copy the data that arrives from one feed to anotherYou could combine data from multiple feeds into a single feed.

When Force Stop from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. The force is strong with you.. When you do a force rest, your calendar says that you are strong in the force.

When Force Pull from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Use 'Force Pull' to turn on Adafruit IO devices. Use 'Force Pull' and 'Force Push' to toggle Adafruit IO devices on and off.

When Force Pull from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Breathe lights using LIFX. Force pull with your Sphero band to magically pulse your LIFX lights. Pick the color you want your lights to be below ÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ when you pull with Sphero, "the force" will cause them to pulse slowly five timesGreat for spooking siblings!

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Change color of lights using LIFX. if phone drops below 15% battery turn home lights red. Pokemon Go got your battery run down? Get a visual alert that you need to get your battery pack and plug back in!

When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Blink lights using LIFX. Blink my lights when your phone battery is low. Don't forget to charge your phone! This Applet will help you to remember by blinking your lights when your battery is low.
When Button press from Button widget, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Turn on Power. Send "1" to remotely connected device to turn on power.
When Button press from Button widget, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Send Location to Feed. Send your current longitude and latitude to a feed.

When Force Push from Star Wars Force Band by Sphero, do Toggle on/off using WeMo Smart Plug. Toggle your WEMO Switch using the force!. Impress your friends by controlling any device that you have plugged into your WEMO switch with a "Force Push" on your Star Wars Force Band.

When Timer activated from Musaic, do Dim the Light using WeMo Lighting. Wake up gently with music and light. Add an IFTTT Action to an alarm/wakeup timer on your Musaic system to wake you up to your favourite radio station whilst turning on a WeMo light at a low brightness.

When Timer activated from Musaic, do Turn lights on using LIFX. Wake up gently with music and light. Add an IFTTT Action to an alarm/wakeup timer on your Musaic system to wake you up to your favourite radio station whilst turning on your LIFX lights in the bedroom at a low brightness.
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. hightemp. Push to feather tag

When Timer activated from Musaic, do Dim a light using LightwaveRF Lighting. Wake up to music via Musaic while your Lightwave lights fade on. Add an IFTTT Action to an alarm/wakeup timer on your Musaic system to wake you up to your favorite radio station while turning on your Lightwave RF lights at a low brightness.

When You exit an area from Location, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If you leave home, update adafruit io feed.. Select your home address, select your adafruit feed, you could write a ZERO to the feed (indicating AWAY), then use another Applet for arriving home.
When Battery drops below 15% from Android Battery, do Set Output Level using littleBits. turn on cloudebit led if cell batt <15%. avoid battery crash w/o warning

When You enter an area from Location, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. If your iOS device enters an area, notify feed. Send current location to feed if your iOS device is in a defined location.

When Every day at from Date & Time, do Speak to me using Musaic. Remind me to.... Enter a time and the text you would like spoken by a Musaic player (multiple languages supported) to create a reminder that runs every day.

When Press bttn from Bttn, do Speak to me using Musaic. Have your Musaic speak a message when you press your bttn. Create a 'Dinner is ready!' or 'It's 4 o'clock Friday!' buttonSimply enter the text you would like spoken (multiple languages)Run this Applet in parallel with any bttn Applet to add speech to other bttn actions.
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Send data to Adafruit IO using Adafruit. Send high temp daily at 7AM. Feather high temp test
